feedback.text: Hello, please also add videogames to the list of digital goods to be protected. A friend of mine gifted me the game "Overwatch" which was a game you bought, so that you can play it. In 2022, Blizzard (the publisher) shut the game down in favour of it's successor, "Overwatch 2". I have the option to migrate my Account, but it is not the same game. If i ever want to play Overwatch again, i will never be able to do it. Thank you for taking the time and reading this comment, and have a nice day!
